title: Egyptian Tagine with Spicy Meat
description: A flavorful and aromatic tagine dish from Egypt, made with spicy meat and served over a bed of rice.

ingredients.name: Rest of the Tagine (Tomatoes, Garlic, and Spices)

instructions: Heat the olive oil in the bottom of a clay or ceramic tagine.
Add the chopped carrots and onions and sauté until they start to soften.
Add the chopped tomatoes, garlic, and tagine spice mix.
Add the lamb or beef pieces and stir to combine.
Cover the tagine and cook over low heat for 1-2 hours, or until the meat is tender.
Serve the tagine over a bed of cooked rice.
Garnish with fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
